items.purpose: Install KB template into a repository.
Sync KB state and template metadata updates.
Run maintenance pipeline (sync/test/doctor).
Manage IDE integration blocks.
Report KB installation health and state.
Remove KB installation and optional generated files.
Generate stub docs from source signals.
Generate endpoint docs from route/controller annotations.
Build KB index summary file.
Generate intake questions from unresolved placeholders.
Set kb_state for a markdown doc.
Backfill kb_state for docs missing state.
Graph-based impact tracing for docs/code.
Scan drift and write impact report. Reports stale source-mirror docs when source-index.json is present (v2.2).
(v2.3) Show the next best KB action by prioritizing drift unresolved, review backlog, missing critical docs, and stale source mirror coverage.
Mark doc(s) verified with commit stamp.
Inspect or update baseline revision pointer.
Run environment and readiness diagnostics.
Run deterministic KB integrity checks.
Maintain release catalog and notes.
Preview/execute release pipeline DSL.
Manage intent workspaces for structured KB updates.
(v2.4) Audit active intents for missing focus metadata, missing wave, stale focus, and aged records.
Analyze applied intents and surface lesson candidates.
(v2.1) Retroactively package ad-hoc KB commits into archived sub-intents with snapshot.
(v2.4) Preview or persist legacy intent schema migration: full-write for active/closed intents, archive marker-only, and renamed legacy fields moved to legacy_* then removed from originals.
Manage finalization plan TODO list.
Expose/hide KB mount in private-git mode.
Compute chaos score and confidence index. Stale source mirror docs reduce coverage score (v2.2).
Blend source structural signals into chaos model.
Show forward estimate plans with risk bands.
(v2.2) Generate AI extraction prompt for a source file; track source→doc linkage in source-index.json.
(v2.3.5) Write extraction prompt directly to an output file (requires --target-doc).
(v2.2) List tracked source files with no covering KB doc.
(v2.3.5) Register source file into KB ingestion pipeline. Text: chunked immediately (ready). Binary: parser-stub payload (requires-parser).
(v2.3.5) List active intents as a table (id/status/mode/staged count). Pager activates for long output.
